mapper.select: SELECT c.com_cd AS value ,c.com_cd_nm AS label ,COALESCE(c.sort_seq, 0) AS sort_seq FROM event.com_grp_cd g INNER JOIN event.com_cd c ON c.com_grp_cd_seq = g.com_grp_cd_seq WHERE g.com_grp_cd = 'PARTICIPANT_TYPE' AND g.use_yn = 'Y' AND c.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY COALESCE(c.sort_seq, 0), c.com_cd
